description: Recto: treatise with many biblical citations and Judaeo-Arabic comments and explanations. In the recto margin is probably a different text, very likely halakhic. The text on verso discusses the time of death. Also on verso (upside down) is a badly rubbed and faded text, which is some kind of commentary or treatise. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
